title: Immersive Energistics
description: Adds ME-capable wires to Immersive Engineering.
body:
# Immersive Energistics

The official Immersive Engineering support addon for AE2. Currently adds ME-capable wires.

### ME Connector
ME Connectors allow connecting wires to AE2 devices and cables. They only accept one ME wire connection (dense or not).

### ME Relay
ME Relays accept multiple ME wire connections, but they do not connect to AE2 devices and cables.

### ME Wire Coil
The standard ME wires. They can transmit up to 8 channels (with AE2's default channel mode).

### Dense ME Wire Coil
Dense ME wires. They can transmit up 32 channels (with AE2's default channel mode).

### Screenshots

![setup1 network](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AppliedEnergistics/Immersive-Energistics/main/images/setup1_network.png)
